# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

kong_plugin: |-
  type: 'object'
  properties: {}
  
cors_settings: |-
  `type': object
    required: ['origin', 'methods']
    `properties': {
        origin : {'type': 'string'},
         methods:{'type' :'array','items'(enum:'GET POST PUT DELETE')}, 
          headers:{('type' :'object'),'properties':{'Access-Control-Allow-Origin':{'type':'string'} } },  
   `additionalProperties': True,
     `description': 'CORS plugin settings.'}
      
authentication_settings: |+'- type: object\n  required: []'\n properties:\n - name:'\n        description : A human-readable identifier for the authenticated user. \ntype's values must be one of "user", "\default"'. '`additionalProperties': True
  
rate_limiting_settings: |+'- type: object'\n  required:\n    - timeframe '\ndescription : Rate limiting plugin settings.'\n properties:'     max-requests'          min'(enum:-1,0)'           reset(int) 'type of the value cannot be less than or equal to zero in case `min` is set as '-1', else it can not have any negative values'.
